content.en:
"Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon, Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon is really rich, so many resources, and a lot of space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragments. "

"This is the end of the world!"

Ye Tian sensed a special leaf that had been sealed layer by layer, this leaf contained a terrifying aura of finality, even if it was sealed, there was still a trace of the aura of finality escaping.

Compared to the previous aura of the end, this thing of the end is the real treasure.

"The final thing is extremely terrifying, and the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon can only seal it, and they don't dare to study it, otherwise they will be eroded and killed. "

Ye Tian is not afraid of this kind of final thing, he has entered the ruins of time and space, and studied the final thing here, even if it falls, he can let other replica bodies continue to study, and he is not afraid of affecting the human race.

If he studied among the human race, once the final breath broke out, he would not have time to rescue.

Therefore, it is undoubtedly the best choice to study the ruins of time and space.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian had been studying this final thing.

When he unlocked the seal, the aura of finality emanating from this leaf spread along the palm of his hand to Ye Tian's whole body.

After a while, his 30 replica body was a little unbearable.

However, he did not panic at all, but was even more excited.

From this leaf, he could sense a trace of the essence of the power of the end, something that the breath of the end did not have.

This leaf helped him a lot, and it could even help him perfect the seventh form, the final form, if he could perfect the final form, he would be able to burst out the combat power of the final form for a long time.

At that time, no matter how many there were in that group of Ultimate Ancient Demons, they would all be ant-like scum in his eyes.

The days that followed.

While Ye Tian was researching and perfecting the final form, he also absorbed and refined various resources from the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon and the Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon to improve his cultivation, as well as comprehend the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao!

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's strength was undoubtedly increasing little by little.

He also knew that more of the Ancient Demons and the Ultimate Ancient Demons had awakened, but as long as they didn't provoke him, he didn't bother to deal with them.

And just like that, a long time passed.

During this time, all the ancient demons awakened.

this day.

A group of Ultimate Ancient Demons, numbering about sixty or so, were all Ultimate Ancient Demons who survived that battle.

At this moment, they were in a meeting, led by the three ultimate ancient demons, namely the Stygian Ancient Demon, the Muta Ancient Demon, and the Dosha Ancient Demon.

The strength of these three Ultimate Ancient Demons is slightly stronger than the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon and the Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon, but they are not much stronger, and if the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon and the Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon join forces, they can compete with any of them.

"Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon, Heavenly Sword Ancient Demon has been killed!"

The Mutagu Demon Path.

"We know that it was slashed by the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable of this era, and the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable cast a crippled seventh form, the final form, and its combat power is comparable to that of the original Dovi Ancient Demon. However, the Dovi Ancient Demon can only cast the Seventh Form once, and it will fall completely. But this Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Venerable is different, his body is very special, he has more than one special clone, and the clones can all cast the seventh form, if he casts the seventh form again, it is possible to kill a few of us. The Ancient Demon said.

"He can't be an enemy of Wanfa Jizun, he shouldn't be interested in killing us, if he wants to kill us, he can kill us at that time. "Dosha Ancient Demon Dao.

"Let's just say that the actions of those Ultimate Ancient Demons and Ancient Demons before have nothing to do with us!"

The Ancient Demon of Stygian suggested.

"Yes!"

The other Ultimate Ancient Demons nodded.

Immediately, they sent their avatars to communicate with Ye Tian, this time with friendship, and did not directly break into the territory of the human race.

......

"These Ultimate Ancient Demons want to communicate with me, it seems that they have confessed!"

"It just so happens that I can get more information from them, like information about the final catastrophe. "

So, Ye Tian met with them.

Soon.

A group of incarnations of the ultimate ancient demons came, but their main bodies did not come, and they were also worried about being killed.

After all, even if the avatars are killed, their main bodies have the hope of escaping into the ruins of time and space, and maybe they can even hide!

So, naturally, they have to be careful.

In the great hall of the Terrans.

These Ultimate Ancient Demons sat there very cautiously, and they immediately expressed their attitude.

"Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, the actions of the Heavenly Shield Ancient Demon and other Ancient Demons before were their own actions, and they had nothing to do with us, we would definitely not be enemies of the human race, nor would we cause trouble!" said the Ultimate Ancient Demon such as the Stygian Ancient Demon.

Ye Tian said lightly.

Seeing Ye Tian say this, they were relieved, after all, with Ye Tian's strength, they would not deliberately deceive them, if they really killed them, they could only choose to escape, and there was no way to resist.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian asked, "I want to know the situation of the final tribulation, do you know?"

He had deduced that the Final Tribulation had indeed not yet arrived, but it was not too far away, and he was not absolutely sure that he would become the Ultimate Extreme Venerable of the Time and Space Level Extreme Dao before the Final Tribulation arrived!

Therefore, he wanted to ask these ultimate ancient demons if 443 could learn more information.

At the mention of the final tribulation, the faces of the many Ultimate Ancient Demons present were extremely solemn.

The Ancient Demon said: "Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, the final calamity has not yet come, and the next calamity is the final calamity, if there is no time-space level ultimate ancient demon strength, we ultimate ancient demons will almost fall." "

"Except to become a space-time level ultimate ancient demon, you have no other way to survive the tribulation?" Ye Tian asked again.

"Yes, but only a chance. "The Ancient Demon Path.

"Chance?" Ye Tian was surprised, he thought that these ultimate ancient demons had no choice, but he didn't expect that there would be unexpected surprises.

"What chance?"

Ye Tian continued to ask.

The Ancient Demon hesitated for a moment, but still spoke, "Leave this spaceline!"

"What does it mean to leave this spaceline?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

The Ancient Demon explained: "Before, we didn't know, but during one of the Tribulations of the End, a mysterious person appeared, and the other party waved his hand and took a rather amazing thing of the End, and then left. And from this mysterious man, we learn a secret. It is this secret that gives us hope for life!"
